results.title: David Warner Laments Getting 'Blocked' By SRH On Instagram: 'They Would Never Unblock Me'
results.description: David Warner says IPL team Sunrisers Hyderabad will 'never' unblock him on Instagram.

results.title: Abhishek Banerjee seeks time from KMC to respond to demolition notice
results.description: Trinamool Congress leader Abhishek Banerjee has sought time from the Kolkata Municipal Corporation (KMC) to reply to the notice regarding the valuation of his property and the demolition of an illegal part of his house at Bhabanipur.

results.title: India and US Strengthen Ties: Jaishankar Outlines Five Key Principles
results.description: External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar recently outlined a five-point strategy to enhance India-US relations during discussions with US Secretary of State Marco Rubio. The meeting, held in New Delhi, emphasized the importance of dialogue, maritime commerce, and adherence to international law. Both leaders expressed optimism about finalizing an interim trade agreement and strengthening defense cooperation. Jaishankar's principles aim to address global challenges and foster resilient partnerships, reflecting a commitment to a robust strategic alliance. Rubio echoed this sentiment, highlighting the positive trajectory of India-US relations. Discover more about their discussions and future collaborations.

results.title: event on Birth Anniversary of Pratap Singh Barhath
results.description: भाजपा के पूर्व राज्यसभा सांसद ओंकार सिंह लखावत ने कहा कि आज फिर से देशभक्तों के खड़े होने की जरूरत है.

results.title: Rivers ADC guber primary: Aspirant accuses Amaechi of imposition, says three winners emerged
results.description: An aspirant in the African Democratic Congress, ADC, gubernatorial primary election in Rivers State, Dr. Allen Idaso Ezekiel-Hart, has rejected the exercise. Ezekiel-Hart described the primary election as a shambolic charade allegedly orchestrated by former Rivers State Governor, Rotimi Amaechi, to impose a preferred candidate. The aspirant, who addressed journalists in Abuja on Saturday, claimed the [...] Rivers ADC guber primary: Aspirant accuses Amaechi of imposition, says three winners emerged

results.title: Fadnavis mocks Rahul Gandhi’s NDA collapse remark as ‘daydreaming’
results.description: Devendra Fadnavis dismissed Rahul Gandhi’s prediction that the NDA government would collapse within a year, calling it “daydreaming.” Speaking in Nagpur, Fadnavis also highlighted Maharashtra’s logistics push aimed at boosting global competitiveness and reducing business costs
